steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") set value(Corkery, Wintheiser and Kassulke)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[4]/input") set value(Salazar Slytherin)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")

parameters.name: car
parameters.value: Car(engineType=Diesel, mark=Corkery, Wintheiser and Kassulke, model=Salazar Slytherin, price=8442.01)

steps.name: Проверка успешности создания автомобиля и получение его id
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should have(match text ".*\d+.*")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should have(match text ".*\d+.*")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") set value(Zulauf Group)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[4]/input") set value(Vincent Crabbe, Sr.)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")

parameters.name: car
parameters.value: Car(engineType=PHEV, mark=Zulauf Group, model=Vincent Crabbe, Sr., price=7156.11)

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") set value(Kozey Inc)
